text: bachodesh hashemini bishenat shetayim ledareyavesh haya devar-yehva el-zekhareya ben-berekheya ben-'idov hanavi lemor
qatsaf yehva 'al-avovteykhem qatsef
veamareta alehem ko amar yehva tsevaovt shuvu elay neum yehva tsevaovt veashuv aleykhem amar yehva tsevaovt

al-tiheyu khaavoteykhem asher qareu-aleyhem haneviim harishonim lemor ko amar yehva tsevaovt shuvu na midarekheykhem hara'im uma'alileykhem kh uma'aleleykhem q hara'im velo shame'u velo-hiqeshivu elay neum-yehva
avovteykhem ayeh-hem vehaneviim hale'ovlam yicheyu
akh ׀ devaray vechuqay asher tsiviti et-'avaday haneviim halov hisigu avoteykhem vayashuvu vayomeru kaasher zamam yehva tsevaovt la'asovt lanu kiderakheynu ukhema'alaleynu ken 'asa itanu s
beyovm 'eserim veareba'a le'ashetey-'asar chodesh hu-chodesh shevat bishenat shetayim ledareyavesh haya devar-yehva el-zekhareya ben-berekheyahu ben-'idov hanavi lemor
raiti ׀ halayela vehineh-ish rokhev 'al-sus adom vehu 'omed beyn hahadasim asher bametsula veacharayv susim adumim seruqim ulevanim
vaomar mah-ele adoni vayomer elay hamaleakh hadover bi ani areeka mah-hema ele
vaya'an haish ha'omed beyn-hahadasim vayomar ele asher shalach yehva lehitehalekh baarets
vaya'anu et-maleakh yehva ha'omed beyn hahadasim vayomeru hitehalakhenu vaarets vehine khal-haarets yoshevet veshoqatet
vaya'an maleakhe-yehva vayomar yehva tsevaovt 'ad-matay ata lo-terachem et-yerushalaim veet 'arey yehuda asher za'ameta ze shive'im shana
vaya'an yehva et-hamaleakh hadover bi devarim tovvim devarim nichumim
vayomer elay hamaleakh hadover bi qera lemor ko amar yehva tsevaovt qineti lirushalaim uletsiyovn qinea gedovla
veqetsef gadovl ani qotsef 'al-hagovyim hashaananim asher ani qatsafeti me'at vehema 'azeru lera'a
lakhen koh-amar yehva shaveti lirushalaim berachamim beyti yibane bah neum yehva tsevaovt veqava kh veqav q yinate 'al-yerushalaim
'ovd ׀ qera lemor ko amar yehva tsevaovt 'ovd tefutseyna 'aray mitovv venicham yehva 'ovd et-tsiyovn uvachar 'ovd birushalaim s
vaesa et-'eynay vaere vehine areba' qeranovt
vaomar el-hamaleakh hadover bi mah-ele vayomer elay ele haqeranovt asher zeru et-yehuda et-yiserael virushalam ׃ s
vayareeni yehva areba'a charashim

vaomar ma ele vaim la'asovt vayomer lemor ele haqeranovt asher-zeru et-yehuda kefi-ish lo-nasa roshov vayavou ele lehacharid otam leyadovt et-qarenovt hagovyim hanoseim qeren el-erets yehuda lezarovtah s
vaesa 'eynay vaere vehineh-ish uveyadov chevel mida
vaomar ana ata holekh vayomer elay lamod et-yerushalaim lireovt kamah-rachebah vekhama arekah
vehine hamaleakh hadover bi yotse umaleakh acher yotse liqeratov
vayomer elav ruts daber el-hana'ar halaz lemor perazovt teshev yerushalaim merov adam uvehema betovkhah
vaani eheyeh-lah neum-yehva chovmat esh saviv ulekhavovd eheye vetovkhah f
hovy hovy venusu meerets tsafovn neum-yehva ki keareba' ruchovt hashamayim peraseti etekhem neum-yehva
hovy tsiyovn himaleti yovshevet bat-bavel s
ki kho amar yehva tsevaovt achar kavovd shelachani el-hagovyim hasholelim etekhem ki hanoge'a bakhem noge'a bevavat 'eynov
ki hineni menif et-yadi 'aleyhem vehayu shalal le'avedeyhem vida'etem ki-yehva tsevaovt shelachani s
rani vesimechi bat-tsiyovn ki hineni-va veshakhaneti vetovkhekh neum-yehva
venilevu govyim rabim el-yehva bayovm hahu vehayu li le'am veshakhaneti vetovkhekh veyada'at ki-yehva tsevaovt shelachani elayikh
venachal yehva et-yehuda cheleqov 'al ademat haqodesh uvachar 'ovd birushalaim
has kal-basar mipeney yehva ki ne'ovr mime'ovn qadeshov s
vayareeni et-yehovshu'a hakohen hagadovl 'omed lifeney maleakh yehva vehasatan 'omed 'al-yeminov lesitenov
vayomer yehva el-hasatan yige'ar yehva bekha hasatan veyige'ar yehva bekha habocher birushalaim halov ze ud mutsal meesh
vihovshu'a haya lavush begadim tsovim ve'omed lifeney hamaleakh
vaya'an vayomer el-ha'omedim lefanayv lemor hasiru habegadim hatsoim me'alayv vayomer elayv ree he'evareti me'aleykha 'aonekha vehalebesh otekha machalatsovt
vaomar yasimu tsanif tahovr 'al-roshov vayasimu hatsanif hatahovr 'al-roshov vayalebishuhu begadim umaleakh yehva 'omed
vaya'ad maleakh yehva bihovshu'a lemor
koh-amar yehva tsevaovt im-biderakhay telekh veim et-mishemareti tishemor vegam-ata tadin et-beyti vegam tishemor et-chatseray venatati lekha mahelekhim beyn ha'omedim haele
shema'-na yehovshu'a ׀ hakohen hagadovl ata vere'eykha hayoshevim lefaneykha ki-aneshey movfet hema ki-hineni mevi et-'avedi tsemach
ki ׀ hine haeven asher natati lifeney yehovshu'a 'al-even achat shive'a 'eynayim hineni mefatecha pituchah neum yehva tsevaovt umasheti et-'aon haarets-hahi beyovm echad
bayovm hahu neum yehva tsevaovt tiqereu ish lere'ehu el-tachat gefen veel-tachat teena
vayashav hamaleakh hadover bi vaye'ireni keish asher-ye'ovr mishenatov
vayomer elay ma ata roe vayomer kh vaomar q raiti ׀ vehine menovrat zahav kulah vegulah 'al-roshah veshive'a neroteyha 'aleyha shive'a veshive'a mutsaqovt lanerovt asher 'al-roshah
ushenayim zeytim 'aleyha echad mimin hagula veechad 'al-semolah
vaa'an vaomar el-hamaleakh hadover bi lemor mah-ele adoni
vaya'an hamaleakh hadover bi vayomer elay halov yada'eta mah-hema ele vaomar lo adoni
vaya'an vayomer elay lemor ze devar-yehva el-zerubavel lemor lo vechayil velo vekhocha ki im-beruchi amar yehva tsevaovt
mi-ata har-hagadovl lifeney zerubavel lemishor vehovtsi et-haeven harosha teshuovt chen chen lah f
vayehi devar-yehva elay lemor
yedey zerubavel yisedu habayit haze veyadayv tevatsa'ena veyada'eta ki-yehva tsevaovt shelachani aleykhem
ki mi vaz leyovm qetanovt vesamechu verau et-haeven habedil beyad zerubavel shive'ah-ele 'eyney yehva hema meshovtetim bekhal-haarets
vaa'an vaomar elayv mah-sheney hazeytim haele 'al-yemin hamenovra ve'al-semovlah
vaa'an shenit vaomar elayv mah-shetey shibaley hazeytim asher beyad sheney tsaneterovt hazahav hameriqim me'aleyhem hazahav
vayomer elay lemor halov yada'eta mah-ele vaomar lo adoni
vayomer ele sheney veney-hayitsehar ha'omedim 'al-adovn kal-haarets
vaashuv vaesa 'eynay vaeree vehine megila 'afa
vayomer elay ma ata roe vaomar ani roe megila 'afa arekah 'eserim baama verachebah 'eser baama
vayomer elay zot haala hayovtset 'al-peney khal-haarets ki khal-hagonev mize kamovha niqa vekhal-hanisheba' mize kamovha niqa
hovtsetiha neum yehva tsevaovt uvaa el-beyt haganav veel-beyt hanisheba' bishemi lashaqer velane betovkh beytov vekhilatu veet-'etsayv veet-avanayv
vayetse hamaleakh hadover bi vayomer elay sa na 'eyneykha uree ma hayovtset hazot
vaomar mah-hi vayomer zot haeyfa hayovtset vayomer zot 'eynam bekhal-haarets
vehine kikar 'oferet niset vezot isha achat yovshevet betovkh haeyfa
vayomer zot harishe'a vayashelekh otah el-tovkh haeyfa vayashelekh et-even ha'oferet el-piha s
vaesa 'eynay vaere vehine shetayim nashim yovtseovt verucha bekhanefeyhem velahena khenafayim kekhanefey hachasida vatisena et-haeyfa beyn haarets uveyn hashamayim
vaomar el-hamaleakh hadover bi ana hema movlikhovt et-haeyfa
vayomer elay livenovt-la vayit beerets shine'ar vehukhan vehunicha sham 'al-mekhunatah s
vaashuv vaesa 'eynay vaeree vehine areba' marekavovt yotseovt mibeyn sheney heharim veheharim harey nechoshet
bamerekava harishona susim adumim uvamerekava hashenit susim shechorim
uvamerekava hashelishit susim levanim uvamerekava harevi'it susim berudim amutsim
vaa'an vaomar el-hamaleakh hadover bi mah-ele adoni
vaya'an hamaleakh vayomer elay ele areba' ruchovt hashamayim yovtseovt mehiteyatsev 'al-adovn kal-haarets
asher-bah hasusim hashechorim yotseim el-erets tsafovn vehalevanim yatseu el-achareyhem vehaberudim yatseu el-erets hateyman
vehaamutsim yatseu vayevaqeshu lalekhet lehitehalekh baarets vayomer lekhu hitehalekhu vaarets vatitehalakhena baarets
vayaze'eq oti vayedaber elay lemor ree hayovtseim el-erets tsafovn henichu et-ruchi beerets tsafovn s
vayehi devar-yehva elay lemor
laqovcha meet hagovla mecheleday umeet tovviya umeet yeda'eya uvata ata bayovm hahu uvata beyt yoshiya ven-tsefaneya asher-bau mibavel
velaqacheta khesef-vezahav ve'asita 'atarovt vesameta berosh yehovshu'a ben-yehovtsadaq hakohen hagadovl
veamareta elayv lemor ko amar yehva tsevaovt lemor hineh-ish tsemach shemov umitachetayv yitsemach uvana et-heykhal yehva
vehu yivene et-heykhal yehva vehu-yisa hovd veyashav umashal 'al-kiseov vehaya khohen 'al-kiseov va'atsat shalovm tiheye beyn sheneyhem
veha'atarot tiheye lechelem uletovviya velida'eya ulechen ben-tsefaneya lezikarovn beheykhal yehva
urechovqim ׀ yavou uvanu beheykhal yehva vida'etem ki-yehva tsevaovt shelachani aleykhem vehaya im-shamov'a tisheme'un beqovl yehva eloheykhem s
vayehi bishenat areba' ledareyavesh hamelekh haya devar-yehva el-zekhareya beareba'a lachodesh hateshi'i bekhiselev
vayishelach beyt-el sar-etser veregem melekh vaanashayv lechalovt et-peney yehva
lemor el-hakohanim asher leveyt-yehva tsevaovt veel-haneviim lemor haeveke bachodesh hachamishi hinazer kaasher 'asiti ze kame shanim f
vayehi devar-yehva tsevaovt elay lemor
emor el-kal-'am haarets veel-hakohanim lemor ki-tsametem vesafovd bachamishi uvashevi'i veze shive'im shana hatsovm tsametuni ani
vekhi tokhelu vekhi tishetu halov atem haokhelim veatem hashotim
halov et-hadevarim asher qara yehva beyad haneviim harishonim biheyovt yerushalaim yoshevet usheleva ve'areyha sevivoteyha vehanegev vehashefela yoshev f
vayehi devar-yehva el-zekhareya lemor
ko amar yehva tsevaovt lemor mishepat emet shefotu vechesed verachamim 'asu ish et-achiv
vealemana veyatovm ger ve'ani al-ta'ashoqu vera'at ish achiv al-tacheshevu bilevavekhem
vayemaanu lehaqeshiv vayitenu khatef soraret veazeneyhem hikhebidu mishemov'a
velibam samu shamir mishemov'a et-hatovra veet-hadevarim asher shalach yehva tsevaovt beruchov beyad haneviim harishonim vayehi qetsef gadovl meet yehva tsevaovt
vayehi khaasher-qara velo shame'u ken yiqereu velo eshema' amar yehva tsevaovt
veesa'arem 'al kal-hagovyim asher lo-yeda'um vehaarets nashama achareyhem me'over umishav vayasimu erets-chemeda leshama f
vayehi devar-yehva tsevaovt lemor
ko amar yehva tsevaovt qineti letsiyovn qinea gedovla vechema gedovla qineti lah
ko amar yehva veti el-tsiyovn veshakhaneti betovkh yerushalaim veniqerea yerushalaim 'ir-haemet vehar-yehva tsevaovt har haqodesh s
ko amar yehva tsevaovt 'od yeshevu zeqenim uzeqenovt birechovovt yerushalaim veish mishe'anetov beyadov merov yamim
urechovovt ha'ir yimaleu yeladim viladovt mesachaqim birechovoteyha s
ko amar yehva tsevaovt ki yipale be'eyney sheerit ha'am haze bayamim hahem gam-be'eynay yipale neum yehva tsevaovt f
ko amar yehva tsevaovt hineni movshi'a et-'ami meerets mizerach umeerets mevov hashamesh
veheveti otam veshakhenu betovkh yerushalaim vehayu-li le'am vaani eheye lahem lelohim beemet uvitsedaqa s
koh-amar yehva tsevaovt techezaqena yedeykhem hashome'im bayamim haele et hadevarim haele mipi haneviim asher beyovm yusad beyt-yehva tsevaovt haheykhal lehibanovt
ki lifeney hayamim hahem sekhar haadam lo niheya usekhar habehema eynena velayovtse velaba eyn-shalovm min-hatsar vaashalach et-kal-haadam ish bere'ehu
ve'ata lo khayamim harishonim ani lisheerit ha'am haze neum yehva tsevaovt
ki-zera' hashalovm hagefen titen pireyah vehaarets titen et-yevulah vehashamayim yitenu talam vehinechaleti et-sheerit ha'am haze et-kal-ele
vehaya kaasher heyitem qelala bagovyim beyt yehuda uveyt yiserael ken ovshi'a etekhem viheyitem berakha al-tirau techezaqena yedeykhem s
ki kho amar yehva tsevaovt kaasher zamameti lehara' lakhem behaqetsif avoteykhem oti amar yehva tsevaovt velo nichameti
ken shaveti zamameti bayamim haele leheytiv et-yerushalaim veet-beyt yehuda al-tirau
ele hadevarim asher ta'asu daberu emet ish et-re'ehu emet umishepat shalovm shifetu besha'areykhem
veish ׀ et-ra'at re'ehu al-tacheshevu bilevavekhem ushevu'at sheqer al-teehavu ki et-kal-ele asher saneti neum-yehva s
vayehi devar-yehva tsevaovt elay lemor
koh-amar yehva tsevaovt tsovm harevi'i vetsovm hachamishi vetsovm hashevi'i vetsovm ha'asiri yiheye leveyt-yehuda lesasovn ulesimecha ulemo'adim tovvim vehaemet vehashalovm ehavu f
ko amar yehva tsevaovt 'od asher yavou 'amim veyoshevey 'arim rabovt
vehalekhu yoshevey achat el-achat lemor nelekha halovkh lechalovt et-peney yehva ulevaqesh et-yehva tsevaovt elekha gam-ani
uvau 'amim rabim vegovyim 'atsumim levaqesh et-yehva tsevaovt birushalaim ulechalovt et-peney yehva s
ko amar yehva tsevaovt bayamim hahema asher yachaziqu 'asara anashim mikol leshonovt hagovyim vehecheziqu bikhenaf ish yehudi lemor nelekha 'imakhem ki shama'enu elohim 'imakhem s
masa devar-yehva beerets chaderakh vedameseq menuchatov ki layhva 'eyn adam vekhol shivetey yiserael
vegam-chamat tigebal-bah tsor vetsidovn ki chakhema meod
vativen tsor matsovr lah vatitsebar-kesef ke'afar vecharuts ketit chutsovt
hine adonay yovrishena vehika vayam cheylah vehi baesh teakhel
tere asheqelovn vetira ve'aza vetachil meod ve'eqerovn ki-hovish mebatah veavad melekh me'aza veasheqelovn lo teshev
veyashav mamezer beashedovd vehikherati geovn pelishetim
vahasiroti damayv mipiv veshiqutsayv mibeyn shinayv venishear gam-hu leloheynu vehaya kealuf bihuda ve'eqerovn kivusi
vechaniti leveyti mitsava me'over umishav velo-ya'avor 'aleyhem 'ovd noges ki 'ata raiti ve'eynay s
gili meod bat-tsiyovn hari'i bat yerushalaim hine malekekh yavov lakh tsadiq venovsha' hu 'ani verokhev 'al-chamovr ve'al-'ayir ben-atonovt
vehikherati-rekhev meeferayim vesus mirushalaim venikhereta qeshet milechama vediber shalovm lagovyim umashelov miyam 'ad-yam uminahar 'ad-afesey-arets
gam-at bedam-beritekh shilacheti asirayikh mibovr eyn mayim bov
uvu levitsarovn asirey hatiqeva gam-hayovm magid mishene ashiv lakh
ki-darakheti li yehuda qeshet mileti eferayim ve'ovrareti vanayikh tsiyovn 'al-banayikh yavan vesametikh kecherev gibovr
vayhva 'aleyhem yerae veyatsa khabaraq chitsov vadonay yehovi bashovfar yiteqa' vehalakh besa'arovt teyman
yehva tsevaovt yagen 'aleyhem veakhelu vekhaveshu aveney-qela' veshatu hamu kemov-yayin umaleu kamizeraq kezaviyovt mizebecha
vehovshi'am yehva eloheyhem bayovm hahu ketson 'amov ki aveney-nezer mitenovsesovt 'al-adematov
ki mah-tuvov umah-yafeyov dagan bachurim vetirovsh yenovvev betulovt
shaalu meyehva matar be'et maleqovsh yehva 'ose chazizim umetar-geshem yiten lahem leish 'esev basade
ki haterafim diberu-aven vehaqovsemim chazu sheqer vachalomovt hashav yedaberu hevel yenachemun 'al-ken nase'u khemov-tson ya'anu ki-eyn ro'e f
'al-haro'im chara api ve'al-ha'atudim efeqovd ki-faqad yehva tsevaovt et-'ederov et-beyt yehuda vesam ovtam kesus hovdov bamilechama
mimenu fina mimenu yated mimenu qeshet milechama mimenu yetse khal-novges yachedav
vehayu khegiborim bovsim betit chutsovt bamilechama venilechamu ki yehva 'imam vehovishu rokhevey susim
vegibareti ׀ et-beyt yehuda veet-beyt yovsef ovshi'a vehovshevovtim ki richametim vehayu kaasher lo-zenachetim ki ani yehva eloheyhem vee'enem
vehayu khegibovr eferayim vesamach libam kemov-yayin uveneyhem yireu vesamechu yagel libam bayhva
eshereqa lahem vaaqabetsem ki feditim veravu kemov ravu
veezera'em ba'amim uvamerechaqim yizekeruni vechayu et-beneyhem vashavu
vahashivovtim meerets mitserayim umeashur aqabetsem veel-erets gile'ad ulevanovn aviem velo yimatse lahem
ve'avar bayam tsara vehika vayam galim vehovishu kol metsulovt yeor vehurad geovn ashur veshevet mitserayim yasur
vegibaretim bayhva uvishemov yitehalakhu neum yehva s
petach levanovn delateykha vetokhal esh baarazeykha
heylel berovsh ki-nafal erez asher adirim shudadu heylilu alovney vashan ki yarad ya'ar habatsur kh habatsir q
qovl yilelat haro'im ki shudeda adaretam qovl shaagat kefirim ki shudad geovn hayareden s
ko amar yehva elohay re'e et-tson haharega
asher qoneyhen yaharegun velo yeeshamu umokhereyhen yomar barukh yehva va'eshir vero'eyhem lo yachemovl 'aleyhen
ki lo echemovl 'ovd 'al-yoshevey haarets neum-yehva vehine anokhi mametsi et-haadam ish beyad-re'ehu uveyad malekov vekhitetu et-haarets velo atsil miyadam
vaere'e et-tson haharega lakhen 'aniyey hatson vaeqach-li sheney maqelovt leachad qarati no'am uleachad qarati chovelim vaere'e et-hatson
vaakhechid et-sheloshet haro'im beyerach echad vatiqetsar nafeshi bahem vegam-nafesham bachala vi
vaomar lo ere'e etekhem hameta tamut vehanikhechedet tikached vehanishearovt tokhalena isha et-besar re'utah
vaeqach et-maqeli et-no'am vaegeda' otov lehafeyr et-beriti asher karati et-kal-ha'amim
vatufar bayovm hahu vayede'u khen 'aniyey hatson hashomerim oti ki devar-yehva hu
vaomar aleyhem im-tovv be'eyneykhem havu sekhari veim-lo ׀ chadalu vayisheqelu et-sekhari sheloshim kasef
vayomer yehva elay hashelikhehu el-hayovtser eder hayeqar asher yaqareti me'aleyhem vaeqecha sheloshim hakesef vaashelikh otov beyt yehva el-hayovtser
vaegeda' et-maqeli hasheni et hachovelim lehafer et-haachava beyn yehuda uveyn yiserael s
vayomer yehva elay 'ovd qach-lekha keli ro'e evili
ki hineh-anokhi meqim ro'e baarets hanikhechadovt lo-yifeqod hana'ar lo-yevaqesh vehanisheberet lo yerape hanitsava lo yekhalekel uvesar haberia yokhal ufareseyhen yefareq s
hovy ro'i haelil 'ozevi hatson cherev 'al-zerov'ov ve'al-'eyn yeminov zero'ov yavovsh tivash ve'eyn yeminov kaho tikhehe s
masa devar-yehva 'al-yiserael neum-yehva note shamayim veyosed arets veyotser rucha-adam beqirebov f
hine anokhi sam et-yerushalaim saf-ra'al lekhal-ha'amim saviv vegam 'al-yehuda yiheye vamatsovr 'al-yerushalaim
vehaya vayovm-hahu asim et-yerushalaim even ma'amasa lekhal-ha'amim kal-'omeseyha sarovt yisaretu veneesefu 'aleyha kol govyey haarets
bayovm hahu neum-yehva ake khal-sus batimahovn verokhevov bashiga'ovn ve'al-beyt yehuda efeqach et-'eynay vekhol sus ha'amim ake ba'ivarovn
veameru alufey yehuda belibam ametsa li yoshevey yerushalaim bayhva tsevaovt eloheyhem
bayovm hahu asim et-alufey yehuda kekhiyovr esh be'etsim ukhelapid esh be'amir veakhelu 'al-yamin ve'al-semovl et-kal-ha'amim saviv veyasheva yerushalaim 'ovd tacheteyha birushalaim f
vehovshi'a yehva et-aholey yehuda barishona lema'an lo-tigedal tifeeret beyt-david vetifeeret yoshev yerushalaim 'al-yehuda
bayovm hahu yagen yehva be'ad yovshev yerushalaim vehaya hanikheshal bahem bayovm hahu kedavid uveyt david kelohim kemaleakh yehva lifeneyhem
vehaya bayovm hahu avaqesh lehashemid et-kal-hagovyim habaim 'al-yerushalaim
veshafakheti 'al-beyt david ve'al ׀ yovshev yerushalaim rucha chen vetachanunim vehibitu elay et asher-daqaru vesafedu 'alayv kemiseped 'al-hayachid vehamer 'alayv kehamer 'al-habekhovr
bayovm hahu yigedal hamiseped birushalaim kemisepad hadade-rimovn beviqe'at megidovn
vesafeda haarets mishepachovt mishepachovt levad mishepachat beyt-david levad unesheyhem levad mishepachat beyt-natan levad unesheyhem levad
mishepachat beyt-levi levad unesheyhem levad mishepachat hashime'i levad unesheyhem levad
kol hamishepachovt hanishearovt mishepachot mishepachot levad unesheyhem levad s
bayovm hahu yiheye maqovr nifetach leveyt david uleyoshevey yerushalaim lechatat ulenida
vehaya vayovm hahu neum ׀ yehva tsevaovt akherit et-shemovt ha'atsabim min-haarets velo yizakheru 'ovd vegam et-haneviim veet-rucha hatumea a'avir min-haarets
vehaya ki-yinave ish 'ovd veameru elayv aviv veimov yoledayv lo ticheye ki sheqer dibareta beshem yehva udeqaruhu avihu veimov yoledayv behinaveov
vehaya ׀ bayovm hahu yevoshu haneviim ish mechezeyonov behinaveotov velo yilebeshu aderet se'ar lema'an kachesh
veamar lo navi anokhi ish-'oved adama anokhi ki adam hiqenani mine'uray
veamar elayv ma hamakovt haele beyn yadeykha veamar asher hukeyti beyt meahavay s
cherev 'uri 'al-ro'i ve'al-gever 'amiti neum yehva tsevaovt hakh et-haro'e utefutseyna hatson vahashivoti yadi 'al-hatso'arim
vehaya vekhal-haarets neum-yehva pi-shenayim bah yikaretu yigeva'u vehashelishit yivater bah
veheveti et-hashelishit baesh utserafetim kitserof et-hakesef uvechanetim kivechon et-hazahav hu ׀ yiqera vishemi vaani e'ene otov amareti 'ami hu vehu yomar yehva elohay s
hine yovm-ba layhva vechulaq shelalekh beqirebekh
veasafeti et-kal-hagovyim ׀ el-yerushalaim lamilechama venilekeda ha'ir venashasu habatim vehanashim tishagalena kh tishakhavena q veyatsa chatsi ha'ir bagovla veyeter ha'am lo yikaret min-ha'ir
veyatsa yehva venilecham bagovyim hahem keyovm hilachamov beyovm qerav
ve'amedu ragelayv bayovm-hahu 'al-har hazetim asher 'al-peney yerushalaim miqedem veniveqa' har hazeytim mechetseyov mizeracha vayama gey gedovla meod umash chatsi hahar tsafovna vechetseyov-negeba
venasetem gey-haray ki-yagi'a gey-harim el-atsal venasetem kaasher nasetem mipeney hara'ash bimey 'uziya melekhe-yehuda uva yehva elohay kal-qedoshim 'imakh
vehaya bayovm hahu lo-yiheye ovr yeqarovt yiqepeun kh veqipaovn q
vehaya yovm-echad hu yivada' layhva lo-yovm velo-layela vehaya le'et-'erev yiheyeh-ovr
vehaya ׀ bayovm hahu yetseu mayim-chayim mirushalaim chetseyam el-hayam haqademovni vechetseyam el-hayam haacharovn baqayits uvachoref yiheye
vehaya yehva lemelekh 'al-kal-haarets bayovm hahu yiheye yehva echad ushemov echad
yisovv kal-haarets ka'arava migeva' lerimovn negev yerushalaim veraama veyasheva tacheteyha lemisha'ar bineyamin 'ad-meqovm sha'ar harishovn 'ad-sha'ar hapinim umigedal chananeel 'ad yiqevey hamelekh
veyashevu vah vecherem lo yiheyeh-'ovd veyasheva yerushalaim lavetach
vezot ׀ tiheye hamagefa asher yigof yehva et-kal-ha'amim asher tsaveu 'al-yerushalaim hameq ׀ besarov vehu 'omed 'al-ragelayv ve'eynayv timaqena vechoreyhen uleshovnov timaq befihem
vehaya bayovm hahu tiheye mehumat-yehva raba bahem vehecheziqu ish yad re'ehu ve'aleta yadov 'al-yad re'ehu
vegam-yehuda tilachem birushalaim veusaf cheyl kal-hagovyim saviv zahav vakhesef uvegadim larov meod
vekhen tiheye magefat hasus hapered hagamal vehachamovr vekhal-habehema asher yiheye bamachanovt hahema kamagefa hazot
vehaya kal-hanovtar mikal-hagovyim habaim 'al-yerushalaim ve'alu midey shana veshana lehishetachaot lemelekh yehva tsevaovt velachog et-chag hasukovt
vehaya asher lo-ya'ale meet mishepechovt haarets el-yerushalaim lehishetachaot lemelekh yehva tsevaovt velo 'aleyhem yiheye hagashem
veim-mishepachat mitserayim lo-ta'ale velo vaa velo 'aleyhem tiheye hamagefa asher yigof yehva et-hagovyim asher lo ya'alu lachog et-chag hasukovt
zot tiheye chatat mitserayim vechatat kal-hagovyim asher lo ya'alu lachog et-chag hasukovt
bayovm hahu yiheye 'al-metsilovt hasus qodesh layhva vehaya hasirovt beveyt yehva kamizeraqim lifeney hamizebecha
vehaya kal-sir birushalaim uvihuda qodesh layhva tsevaovt uvau kal-hazovechim velaqechu mehem uvishelu vahem velo-yiheye khena'ani 'ovd beveyt-yehva tsevaovt bayovm hahu
